title: Gift assignment blocked for newly added employee
symptoms: eligible in HR export but unavailable in reward distribution
resolution_summary: Refresh eligibility data for the client account, verify roster synchronization, then retry gift assignment. Escalate only if the employee remains unavailable after refresh.

title: Employee cannot activate platform access after invitation
resolution_summary: Validate recipient email, regenerate the invitation if allowed, and confirm that the activation link is still valid.

title: Card transaction declined outside permitted merchant scope
symptoms: merchant is not food or restaurant category
benefit card not accepted at retailer
resolution_summary: Check the merchant category first. Some benefit-card balances can only be used in allowed food-related categories, so declines may be expected rather than technical failures.

title: Bulk reward campaign succeeds except for inactive employees
symptoms: reward sent to most users but not all
resolution_summary: Filter inactive employees from the campaign or correct the employee status before retrying the reward distribution.
